gold: Anna, son transferinde biraz gecikme olmuştu. Son transferimi bir gösterir misin? Bana email gönderir misin son transferin detaylarını?
predicted: Anla, son transferimde biraz gecikme olmuştu. Son transferime bir göz atar mısın? Bana email gönderebilir misin son transferimin detaylarını?
werNormalizedGold: anna son transferinde biraz gecikme olmustu son transferimi bir gosterir misin bana email gonderir misin son transferin detaylarini
werNormalizedPredicted: anla son transferimde biraz gecikme olmustu son transferime bir goz atar misin bana email gonderebilir misin son transferimin detaylarini
sigWerNormalizedGold: anna son transferinde biraz gecikme olmustu son transferimi bir gosterir misin bana email gonderir misin son transferin detaylarini
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: anla son transferimde biraz gecikme olmustu son transferime bir goz atar misin bana email gonderebilir misin son transferimin detaylarini

sigWerErrors.reason: 'anna' is a name, 'anla' means 'understand' in Turkish; this changes the subject and meaning of the sentence.
The possessive suffix changes from 'your transfer' to 'my transfer', which alters the meaning but the context is still about a transfer.
Minor grammatical error, both refer to 'my transfer' but with a different case ending; meaning is mostly preserved.
Insertion of 'goz' (eye) as part of the phrase 'goz atar misin' (can you take a look), which is a common alternative to 'gosterir misin' (can you show); does not significantly change the meaning.
'gosterir misin' (can you show) vs 'goz atar misin' (can you take a look); both are requests to check something, so the meaning is preserved.
'gonderir misin' (can you send) vs 'gonderebilir misin' (could you send); both are polite requests, meaning is the same.
